cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned by previous response.

showDebugValues.description: When false (default), excludes MarketIncrease/Decrease/Swap OrderCreated debug events.

toTimestamp.description: Inclusive upper-bound timestamp filter. Accepts seconds or milliseconds.

fromTimestamp.description: Inclusive lower-bound timestamp filter. Accepts seconds or milliseconds.

forAllAccounts.description: When true, returns trades for all accounts.

address.description: Trader address. Required unless `forAllAccounts` is true.
